Comment: It’s about time. One of the greats of the genre.

Good group. Some classics to see for sure. Return of the Living Dead has always been a personal favorite: hilarious and gruesome and great soundtrack.  Just rewatched Candyman, which also has great music. Very curious to hear what you think of that one…
Thanks for sharing this incredible story. I once felt a little nauseous while scarfing down a pizza while watching The Texas Chain Saw Massacre. This is so much better.
